alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with commercial operations and transformation programs, but no direct AML, financial crime, or regulatory compliance background
alignments.job_requirement: 3+ years professional experience in anti-financial crime operations and investigations

alignments.candidate_evidence: No demonstrated expertise in financial crime regulations, KYC, AML, or TRACFIN/ACPR requirements; background is commercial operations and product transformation
alignments.job_requirement: Deep knowledge of European and French regulations on KYC, AML, terrorism financing, sanctions, and fraud

alignments.candidate_evidence: No evidence of Suspicious Activity Report drafting or French financial crime reporting experience
alignments.job_requirement: SAR drafting and 'déclarant TRACFIN' delegation experience

alignments.candidate_evidence: Profile does not state educational credentials; no law or regulatory studies background mentioned
alignments.job_requirement: Law degree (École de droit/Master II) or Grande École background

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker with professional/fluent English; no French language proficiency stated
alignments.job_requirement: Fluent in French and English (spoken and written)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial operations and transformation focus; no KYC, sanctions screening, or financial crime investigation experience evident
alignments.job_requirement: Proven experience in transaction monitoring, sanctions screening, and adverse media investigation

gaps.gap: No anti-financial crime operations, AML, KYC, or financial crime compliance background; candidate experience is commercial operations and transformation, not regulatory/compliance
gaps.mitigation: Candidate would require 3–6 months onboarding to financial crime investigation methodology, TRACFIN/ACPR regulatory framework, and SAR drafting standards; role is fixed-term CDD and does not allow extended ramp

gaps.gap: No demonstrated expertise in French financial crime regulations, TRACFIN reporting requirements, or déclarant TRACFIN role responsibilities
gaps.mitigation: Role explicitly requires deep knowledge of European and French KYC/AML regulations and TRACFIN/ACPR expectations; candidate lacks this foundation

gaps.gap: No SAR drafting, transaction monitoring, sanctions screening, or adverse media investigation experience
gaps.mitigation: Core duties include SARs review/submission, sanctions reviews, and complex investigations; candidate has no direct evidence of these specialized compliance skills

gaps.gap: No French language proficiency; role requires fluent French and English (spoken and written)
gaps.mitigation: Role is Paris-based French MLRO function with French regulatory stakeholders; French fluency is a mandatory operational requirement

gaps.gap: Educational background not stated; role requires law degree (École de droit/Master II) or Grande École qualification
gaps.mitigation: If candidate lacks law or top-tier business school credentials, does not meet baseline educational qualification

gaps.gap: Seniority and scope expectations misaligned; candidate targets manager/senior-IC strategy and operations roles; this is a specialized compliance associate-to-mid-level track with fixed-term contract
gaps.mitigation: Role is 6-month CDD for AFC Operations Associate/SAR Delegate; not a permanent strategic or leadership position in candidate's target family

output.level_rationale: Role requires 3+ years financial crime operations experience, law degree or Grande Ecole, and operational ownership of AML investigations and SAR submissions; reporting to MLRO function at a 1,500-person fintech suggests mid-to-senior IC or junior management scope. Specialized regulatory compliance function at established scale; estimated L4 operations/compliance specialist baseline, potentially L5 with SAR delegation authority.
output.summary: This is a highly specialized 6-month fixed-term Anti-Financial Crime (AFC) operations role requiring 3+ years AML/KYC compliance experience, deep knowledge of French TRACFIN regulations, SAR drafting, and French language fluency. The candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with 8 years in commercial transformation at Google, with no background in financial crime, regulatory compliance, or AML operations. Multiple mandatory requirements—French fluency, law/Grande École education, SAR drafting, TRACFIN expertise, and financial crime investigation—are entirely absent. This is a specialist compliance function, not a strategic or operations transformation role in the candidate's target family. Recommend skip.
uncertainties: Candidate educational background (degree type and institution) not provided in profile; cannot confirm law or Grande École requirement
No information on any regulatory, compliance, or financial crime exposure in candidate profile; absence may be intentional or due to profile incompleteness
Role's reporting line and management scope not explicitly stated; MLRO function structure at N26 unclear from JD alone
